author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Never Alone Mission 2 is Live!

⪛⦿⫺ Brave Explorers, congratulations! You're advancing to Never Alone Mission 2 on Zealy. ⪛⦿⫺

Join us in the next chapter, The Search for Etira, to unveil Saand's long-lost memories.

In mission 2, you will once again earn XP by fulfilling quests and redeeming that XP for Saand's Memories. 

Mission 2 comes with new exclusive loot to obtain:
 Memory Glimpse: Exclusive Never Alone Emote
 Memory Fragment: Fimbul ECOS Unibomba
 Memory Revelation: Exclusive CORE Century Cover

Learn everything you need to know about Mission 2 lore: https://staratlasgame.medium.com/5b502d5ea642 

════════════════

Find the Never Alone Mission 2 quests in the new Sprint added to our Community on Zealy and buckle in for the ride of a lifetime!

 | https://zealy.io/c/staratlas-never-alone/
